---
title: "Workshop 03 — Day 2"
subtitle: "Advanced Summarisation & Final Visualisation Exercise"
date: 2024-09-02
---

## Schedule

| Time | Topic | Facilitator |
|---|---|---|
| 09:00 - 09:30 | Recap & Q&A | Maria Lopez |
| 09:30 - 10:30 | Advanced Summarisation | Maria Lopez |
| 10:30 - 10:45 | Break | |
| 10:45 - 12:00 | Final Visualisation Exercise | John Smith |

## Video Recording

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}

## Slides

[View Slides](slides.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

## R Code

```{.r filename="analysis.R"}
library(tidyverse)

df_clean <- read_csv("arbowatch_data.csv") |>
  drop_na(species, count) |>
  filter(count > 0)

# Summarise by species
species_summary <- df_clean |>
  group_by(species) |>
  summarise(
    total_count = sum(count),
    n_sites = n_distinct(site),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(total_count))

# Visualise top 10
species_summary |>
  slice_max(total_count, n = 10) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(species, total_count), y = total_count)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2E7D32") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Most Observed Species",
    x = "Species",
    y = "Total Count"
  )
```

[Download R Script](analysis.R){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Reference Document

<iframe src="reference.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Download PDF](reference.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
